name: KEYCORP /NEW/
summary: KeyCorp, headquartered in Cleveland, Ohio, is a bank holding company and one of the largest bank-based financial services companies in the U.S., with approximately $184.4 billion in total assets as of December 31, 2025. Through KeyBank National Association and other subsidiaries, it offers retail and commercial banking, commercial leasing, investment management, consumer finance, student loan refinancing, commercial mortgage servicing, investment banking, and capital markets products to individual, corporate, and institutional clients across 15 states.
